name: A086398 (Kimberling's sequence)
note: All terms odd; Kimberling conjectured −1 < n(1+√3) − a(n) < 4
description: A (1,1,4,2)-hiccup sequence where all terms are odd. Kimberling conjectured that −1 < n(1+√3) − a(n) < 4. The sequence is the fixed point of 0 → 10, 1 → 1000 (morphic but not a Beatty sequence). By Lemma 9 of Fokkink–Joshi, it is a translate of A284753.
